name: Light & Easy Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Add onions and garlic to a large saucepan. Cook, covered, over low heat until tender, adding water as needed to prevent burning.
2. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, parsley, oregano, thyme, marjoram, and pepper. Simmer, covered, for about 2 hours.
3. Boil lasagna noodles for about 12 minutes or until al dente. Drain in a colander and rinse with cold water. Drain well.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Lightly oil the bottom of a 13 by 9-inch baking dish.
5. Spread 1/4 of the sauce over the dish, followed by a layer of lasagna noodles. Top with 1/3 ricotta cheese, 1/3 mozzarella, and 1/4 Parmesan. Repeat layers twice more, finishing with Parmesan.
6. Bake until the sauce is bubbly and cheese is melted, about 45 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
